parityMeta.describes: PA-FIX (S10 data-safety prerequisite) applyAdjustmentDraft open-bag round-trip parity — applies an add_sets draft while the current program's dayTemplates carry per-day UNKNOWN/future keys (themeColor / experimentalRpeCap / customBlock / legacyNotes / futureBlockIds), an ABSENT optional block (functionalBlockIds omitted), and a program-level unknown key (futureTopLevelKey). applyAdjustmentDraft rebuilds updatedProgramTemplate.dayTemplates, and that program is the value the S10 write boundary persists — so the rebuild MUST NOT drop unknown keys nor materialise an absent optional block as []. The touched day keeps its open bag through ensureProgramDayTemplate's {...base} spread; the untouched day + the program-level bag survive the cloneProgram rebuild verbatim. Existing apply-draft-cases-v1 days carry all documented blocks and no unknown keys, so the lossy projection was undetected; this fixture pins it (introspection-style load-bearing). Generated from src/engines/programAdjustmentEngine.ts; the Swift port (with the lossless WDay open-bag mirror) canonical-asserts the ApplyAdjustmentDraftResult == golden.
parityMeta.sourceNotes: applyAdjustmentDraft reads the wall clock for appliedAt (ts:829) + makeId for the history id (ts:889); the generator substitutes the injected deterministicClockIso / fixed historyIdSeed so the golden is byte-deterministic. All drafts/templates synthetic; userId values use the allowlisted synthetic-user placeholder; no email/token. The themeColor/customBlock/futureTopLevelKey/legacyNotes/futureBlockIds keys are synthetic unknown-field placeholders proving open-bag passthrough. ZERO WRITE — applyAdjustmentDraft only returns the result.

cases.label: data safety: applies add_sets while PRESERVING per-day unknown keys + ABSENT optional blocks — touched day keeps its open bag via ensureProgramDayTemplate {...base}, untouched day + program-level open bag survive the cloneProgram rebuild verbatim

draft.title: 推 A 下周实验调整
